creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ok, please take your time to find the most suitable term for that, and please have a less discourage term for now.  We already have this "freebsd-kde (Team)":

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/buglist.cgi?email2=kde%40freebsd.org&emailassigned_to2=1&emailcc2=1&emailreporter2=1&emailtype2=substring 

This looks an acceptable mid-way solution, please help on this, thanks.
